scripts.build: npm run build:externals && npm run build -w @camera.ui/transport && npm run build -w @camera.ui/browser
scripts.build:externals: npm --prefix externals/rpc/node ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix externals/rpc/node run build && npm --prefix externals/sdk/node ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix externals/sdk/node run build && rimraf externals/rpc/node/node_modules externals/sdk/node/node_modules
scripts.update: updates --update ./ && npm run update --workspaces --if-present && npm i --save --legacy-peer-deps
